summary: Stepped or level-premium term life insurance for individuals up to age 75 entry. Sum insured options $100,000 to $5,000,000. Optional add-ons: terminal illness benefit (paid on diagnosis with 12-month prognosis), funeral advancement benefit ($25,000), and child cover.
coverage: Lump-sum benefit paid to nominated beneficiaries on the death of the insured. Terminal illness benefit advances the full sum insured upon medical certification of a terminal condition with a life expectancy of 12 months or less. Funeral advancement: a $25,000 advance paid within 5 business days of receiving the death certificate to support immediate funeral costs. Worldwide cover, 24/7. Premiums waived during a paid claim assessment period.
exclusions: Death by suicide within the first 13 months of policy commencement or reinstatement. Death arising from a pre-existing condition not disclosed at underwriting where non-disclosure was material. Death directly caused by participation in a declared act of war as a combatant.
evidenceRequired: Certified copy of beneficiary's photo ID
Coronial report if death is non-natural or under investigation
Treating doctor's statement for terminal-illness advance claims
Beneficiary bank account details for settlement
